title: Jobs — Opt-out for higher-level controllers
text:
If a Job's Pod template already has
spec.schedulingGroup
set, the Job controller
does not create
Workload
or
PodGroup
objects. This allows higher-level controllers
such as
JobSet
to manage the
Workload
and
PodGroup
lifecycle themselves.

Jobs created by a
CronJob
do not have
schedulingGroup
set in the
PodTemplate
.
If a CronJob-created
Job
matches the gang scheduling criteria, the Job controller
creates a separate
Workload
and
PodGroup
for each Job instance.
